Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 
217 
PYMT_LVL_IND 
LABEL: 
Payment Level Indicator – Header or Line 
DESCRIPTION: The field denotes whether the claim payment is made at the header level or the line level. 
SHORT NAME: PYMT_LVL_IND 
LONG NAME: PYMT_LVL_IND 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 
FILE(S): 
IP header 
LT header 
OT header 
RX header 
VALUES: 
1 = Payment/allowed amount is not
